content:
they transferred her whole account and all 20 websites into their name / email. she can no longer log in with her email. how can this happen ? she contacted hostinger but they said it would take a couple of days to get back to her about what’s going on. she had worked on this for a couple of years now and it’s all gone. i do not understand how this could happen :-(

  submitted by   /u/TotsInUrPocket
